creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
On Sun, Dec 27, 1998 at 05:43:11PM -0000, I wrote:
> 
> The attached patch upgrades the leafnode+ port from version 1.2 to
> version 2.3. I am the maintainer of this port.

I forgot to mention, whoever commits this patch should
% cvs add files/INSTALL.mesg

One day I'll manage to get a PR right first time. ;-)

Regards,
Tom
